calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: GAP-A in-arm route-range collapse diagnostic (locate 569g applied route_range=0.0 -> cause i/ii/iii)
items.note: Diagnose-first (user-chosen 2026-06-14) for behavioral_diversity_isolation:GAP-A. Claim-free (claim_ids=[]), experiment_purpose=diagnostic. Locates why V3-EXQ-569g applied modulatory_channel_route_range=0.0 in its falsifier arms despite the readiness probe certifying ARM_1=0.18: measures the LIVE in-arm cand_world_summaries cross-candidate spread + project_channel_range output + applied route_range at the actual select tick across ARM_0/ARM_1/ARM_2, attributing the 0.0 to cause_i (live summary re-collapse) / cause_ii (project_channel_range) / cause_iii (routing-source wiring). Routed by failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-569g_2026-06-14 (instrumentation-defect adjudication: readiness gate certifies the channel-representation spread, not the applied per-candidate routed bias). Gates the 4th modulatory-bias-selection-authority /implement-substrate amend + the eventual V3-EXQ-569h post-fix falsifier. SD-056-NaN prime-suspect disconfirmed (569f e2_world_forward divergent=TRUE; V3-EXQ-617 already fixed the multistep NaN).

items.title: BASE harm-landscape discriminativeness diagnostic (diagnose-first for the SD-059/MECH-358 bridge retest re-queue)
items.note: Diagnose-first (user-chosen) for the 2026-06-11 V3-EXQ-603o substrate_not_ready_requeue. 603o already ran the 603l-autopsy redesign (headroom+continuous metric) and failed ONLY harm_landscape_discriminative_on_base (harm_eval_range>=0.02 on 1/3 seeds at proximity_harm=0.15) while the continuous bridge lift was already strong (both ~50.3 vs base ~18.65). Claim-free (claim_ids=[], diagnostic): BASE arm only (bridge OFF), 4 cells x 3 seeds, Stage-H only; proximity_harm sweep {0.10 positive-control,0.12,0.15} at harm_lr=1e-3 + a {0.15,harm_lr=3e-3} training-strength rescue cell, keyed on the SAME harm_eval_range>=0.02 statistic. Locates whether the base-harm-landscape failure is regime-difficulty (find hardest trainable proximity_harm) or harm-training-strength (3x LR rescue). Positive-control gate: if 0.10 fails on >=2/3, self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue (harm-pathway/metric broken), never a regime verdict. Output is the parameter for the corrected SD-059/MECH-358 evidence re-queue V3-EXQ-603q. V3-EXQ-603o is CONSUMED (completed 2026-06-11).

items.title: ARC-063 CRF availability-maintenance readiness -- clean fraction-gated re-run (666b pre-gap differentiation fix + enlarged maturation)
items.note: Claim-free diagnostic (claim_ids=[], experiment_purpose=diagnostic; does NOT weight governance). Clean re-run of V3-EXQ-666b crf_frac_maintained fraction-gate, fixing the ONE defect that starved 666b: the e2ctx full-pool differentiation NON-VACUITY precondition is now measured PRE-gap (crf_max_pairwise_rule_dist at end-of-training, before the 2000-tick context-absent silence gap erodes ARM_1's pool to empty by design; 666b read it post-gap so min-over-ARM_1+ARM_2 = 0.0 starved it even though both load-bearing criteria PASSED), and the maturation window is enlarged N_EPISODES 100->200 so the e2ctx context differentiates a >=2-rule full pool PRE-gap on every seed. LOAD-BEARING discrimination unchanged + POST-gap: ARM_2 (maintenance) crf_frac_maintained >=0.625 where ARM_1 (mature+e2ctx, no maintenance) <0.5. PASS clears substrate_queue crf-availability-maintenance ready=true + unblocks the 654c GAP-B behavioural falsifier (MECH-309/ARC-062, queued separately); substrate_not_ready_requeue (non-vacuity unmet) -> re-queue at larger P0; maintenance_insufficient / differentiation_alone_clears_ceiling -> /failure-autopsy. Dry-run smoke PASS 2026-06-14 (9 cells end-to-end, pre-gap readout functional pre_gap_dist=1.491, correct dry-scale substrate_not_ready self-route, emit_outcome sentinel written). validate_experiments --strict + validate_queue clean. MECH-309/ARC-062/ARC-063 stay candidate/substrate_ceiling/v3_pending/pending_retest_after_substrate -- NOT weakened.
